match.userMessage:
Generate the motion prompt for this scene.

<CURRENT_SCENE>
{
  "sceneId": "scene2",
  "sceneNumber": 2,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "Quick cut to macro: fingers pressing the cool matte surface of the keyboard. Shallow depth of field catches the subtle texture of skin and metal.",
    "dialogue": []
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Macro Keyboard Close-up",
    "durationSeconds": 3,
    "location": "INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "storyBeat": "Emphasize tactile action of typing on terminal"
  },
  "prompts": {
    "visual": {
      "fullPrompt": "Cinematic macro close-up shot of fingers pressing the cool matte surface of a keyboard in precise tactile action, shallow depth of field highlighting the fine texture of skin against metal keycaps with subtle highlights, set within the blurred background of a modern minimalist newsroom at night featuring rain-streaked floor-to-ceiling windows and distant terminal glow, accented by neutral whites soft beige tones and a single deep-rose blotter on the desk, illuminated by soft natural golden-hour spill from streetlights mixing with crisp terminal light, bright direct window lighting with clean directional shadows and high-key airy quality, captured with macro lens at eye-level angle and shallow focus, modern social-first product photography style emphasizing material finish and real-life context",
      "negativePrompt": "text, holograms, floating interfaces, visible faces, full bodies, logos, signage, subtitles, blur on hands, deep shadows, overexposure",
      "components": {
        "sceneDescription": "Quick macro cut showing fingers actively pressing keyboard keys in a focused typing motion",
        "subject": "Fingers on matte keyboard with emphasis on skin and metal texture",
        "environment": "Modern newsroom interior at night with blurred rain-streaked windows and soft terminal glow",
        "lighting": "Soft golden-hour window spill combined with terminal glow and clean directional highlights",
        "camera": "Macro lens, shallow depth of field, eye-level close framing with subtle handheld energy",
        "composition": "Tightly framed tactile detail shot centered on fingers and keyboard surface with blurred background",
        "style": "Modern product photography with tactile editorial energy, crisp material focus, true-to-life color",
        "technical": "16:9 aspect ratio, high resolution macro detail, natural sharpness on contact points",
        "atmosphere": "Focused, sensory, night-time professional tension with immediate tactile presence"
      }
    }
  },
  "continuity": {
    "characterTags": [],
    "environmentTag": "modern_newsroom_rain_night",
    "elementTags": [],
    "colorPalette": "neutral whites, soft beige, deep-rose accents, terminal glow",
    "lightingSetup": "soft golden-hour spill from streetlights on rain-streaked windows, terminal glow",
    "styleTag": "tactile_macro_product_photography"
  }
}
</CURRENT_SCENE>

<SCENE_BEFORE>
(Context: Where is the movement coming from?)
{
  "sceneId": "scene1",
  "sceneNumber": 1,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - NIGHT\n\nWide cinematic shot. Rain streaks a floor-to-ceiling window bathed in soft golden-hour spill from nearby streetlights. A reporter’s hands move across a glowing terminal, keys clicking in crisp rhythm. Neutral whites and soft beige tones dominate the space, punctuated by a single deep-rose accent on the desk blotter.\n\nREPORTER\nWe go live in ten.",
    "dialogue": [
      {
        "character": "REPORTER",
        "line": "We go live in ten.",
        "tone": "calm focused"
      }
    ]
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Wide Newsroom Establishing Shot",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "storyBeat": "Set the scene in the modern newsroom with reporter preparing for live broadcast"
  },
  "prompts": {
    "visual": {
      "fullPrompt": "Wide cinematic establishing shot rendered in modern social-first product photography with tactile editorial energy, REPORTER hands hovering above the glowing terminal keys in calm focused tension, fingers lightly tensed mid-motion with crisp key-click anticipation, modern minimalist newsroom interior featuring floor-to-ceiling windows streaked with rain, neutral white walls and soft beige workstation surfaces accented by a single deep-rose desk blotter, multiple glowing terminals casting cool reflections, soft golden-hour spill from distant streetlights diffusing through the wet glass creating subtle bokeh highlights and warm rim lighting, crisp natural directional shadows with high-key airy atmosphere, wide eye-level camera angle using clean documentary lens with shallow depth of field focused on the terminal area while softly blurring the rain-streaked background, balanced composition placing the hands and terminal as central focal point within the expansive newsroom environment",
      "negativePrompt": "holographic displays, floating UI, text overlays, subtitles, signs, heavy diffusion, dramatic rim lighting, anamorphic flares, blurry motion, over-saturated colors",
      "components": {
        "sceneDescription": "Wide establishing shot of a reporter preparing for broadcast in a rain-streaked modern newsroom at night",
        "subject": "REPORTER hands positioned over glowing terminal in calm focused pose",
        "environment": "Floor-to-ceiling rain-streaked windows in minimalist newsroom with neutral whites, soft beige tones and deep-rose desk accent",
        "lighting": "Soft golden-hour spill from streetlights mixing with cool terminal glow creating natural directional shadows and airy highlights",
        "camera": "Wide eye-level angle with clean documentary lens and shallow depth of field on hands and terminal",
        "composition": "Hands and terminal as central focal point balanced against expansive rain-streaked window background",
        "style": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile editorial energy and high-key natural light",
        "technical": "16:9 aspect ratio, crisp detail on textures, natural micro-contrast without heavy processing",
        "atmosphere": "Tense yet focused professional news environment with fresh sensory calm"
      }
    }
  },
  "continuity": {
    "characterTags": [
      "reporter"
    ],
    "environmentTag": "modern_newsroom_rain_night",
    "elementTags": [],
    "colorPalette": "neutral whites, soft beige, deep-rose accents, terminal glow",
    "lightingSetup": "soft golden-hour spill from streetlights on rain-streaked windows mixed with terminal glow",
    "styleTag": "modern social-first product photography with tactile editorial energy"
  }
}
</SCENE_BEFORE>

<SCENE_AFTER>
(Context: Where does the movement need to end up?)
{
  "sceneId": "scene3",
  "sceneNumber": 3,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "A producer enters frame left, printed page in hand, movement fluid and unhurried. Natural window light catches the edge of the paper.\n\nPRODUCER\nStory just broke. We need this on air now.\n\nLocked beauty shot: the lede headline fills the frame, crisp black text on cream stock. One corner lifts slightly, catching a clean directional highlight.\n\nThe reporter’s eyes lift, expression calm and focused. Handheld micro-movement follows as the producer slides the page into place. Outside, rain continues in soft vertical lines.\n\nOn-screen graphic pops in editorial white and rose: LIVE in ten.\n\nFinal frame holds on the terminal glow reflecting on the reporter’s face—bright, immediate, effortlessly cool.",
    "dialogue": [
      {
        "character": "PRODUCER",
        "line": "Story just broke. We need this on air now.",
        "tone": "urgent fluid"
      }
    ]
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Producer Delivers Breaking Story",
    "durationSeconds": 12,
    "location": "INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "storyBeat": "Deliver breaking news and prepare for live broadcast"
  },
  "prompts": {
    "visual": {
      "fullPrompt": "Handheld editorial frame in a modern newsroom at night, PRODUCER enters fluidly from the left holding a printed page with unhurried motion while natural window light catches the paper's edge, REPORTER seated at the desk with eyes calmly lifting in focused attention, floor-to-ceiling windows streaked with soft vertical rain lines, glowing terminals and neutral white desks accented by deep-rose blotter, bright natural window light with golden-hour streetlight spill creating crisp directional shadows and tactile textures, shallow depth of field emphasizing material details, energetic handheld camera angle with natural micro-movement, clean bright color palette with true-to-life warmth and lifted shadows",
      "negativePrompt": "",
      "components": {
        "sceneDescription": "Producer enters frame left with printed page, reporter's eyes lift in calm focus within the newsroom",

        "lighting": "Bright natural window light mixed with soft golden-hour streetlight spill, clean directional shadows, tactile textures",
        "camera": "Handheld with natural micro-movement, slightly above eye level, shallow depth of field",
        "composition": "Fluid entry from left focusing on page and seated reporter interaction",
        "style": "Modern social-first editorial photography with tactile real-life energy and crisp film stock",
        "technical": "16:9 aspect, high resolution, bright natural finish, minimal processing",
        "atmosphere": "Tense yet effortlessly cool professional news environment, fresh and sensory"
      }
    }
  },
  "continuity": {
    "characterTags": [

      "reporter"
    ],

}

<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
(Strictly apply camera movement and pacing preferences)
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>

<ASPECT_RATIO>
16:9
</ASPECT_RATIO>
